conjectures.title: Claude Code uses on-demand tool indexing
conjectures.hypothesis: Large manifest produces measurable token overhead at tool-call time if false
evidence: Original session (2026-02-04) + current: 4324 tools loaded without context overflow

conjectures.title: Arglist heuristic yields >80% precision on text functions
conjectures.hypothesis: Manual audit of 50 random functions shows <80% are useful for text transformation

conjectures.title: emacsclient round-trip <50ms for pure string functions
conjectures.hypothesis: Measured latency exceeds 50ms making tool calls user-visible
evidence: Live dispatch tests: median <5ms for string-trim, well under 50ms

conjectures.title: Non-ASCII survives escape-emacsclient-emacs-stdout round trip
conjectures.hypothesis: CJK, emoji, or combining characters are corrupted in output
evidence: Live tests: CJK, emoji, combining chars survive round trip

conjectures.title: Maximalist manifest causes measurable latency difference at init
conjectures.hypothesis: No statistically significant difference between core and maximalist init time
evidence: EMCP_TRACE=1: measurable parse time delta core(69) vs max(4324)

conjectures.title: Vanilla Emacs (--no-init-file) produces >= 200 text-consuming functions
conjectures.hypothesis: The obarray without packages has fewer than 200 text-arg functions, making core mode trivially small
